title: Performance of My Pine Script Trading Bot Over the Past Week - Jan 6 - Jan 10
author: Greedy_Usual_439
selftext:
Hello everyone.   
  
If you all remember I posted about my trading bot, here:[ Reddit Post](https://www.reddit.com/r/Trading/comments/1hhzpna/i_built_a_profitable_consistent_trading_bot/). I have been updating on results for the past few week now. 

We have just finished week 13 of backtesting and manually entering the data at the end of every market day. The results for this week, **Jan 6 - Jan 10:**

**Jan 6**:  
P&L: $1,000  
\# of Trades: 6  
Biggest Drawdown: $0

**Jan 7**:  
P&L: $200  
\# of Trades: 11  
Biggest Drawdown: -$200

**Jan 8**:  
P&L: $800  
\# of Trades: 15   
Biggest Drawdown: -$400

**Jan 9**: Market Closed 

**Jan 10**:  
P&L: -$2,000   
\# of Trades: 3  
Biggest Drawdown: -$2,000

**TOTALS**:  
P&L: $0  
Fees: 35 trades x $3.84 ($1.92/order) = ($134.4)  
**Total Weekly P&L: ($134.4)**  
Average # of Trades/Day:  9   
  
**Notes**:  

* We trade while ADX was below 23 and time was between 10:30am-2:30pm EST. These trades are taken with 3 MNQ contracts. Jan 9  
* This is the 3/13 weeks that closes in the negative (considering we only have the fees that we are done by) 
* Jan 9 market was closed during out session time. (Jimmy Carter)
* If anyone is interested in previous weeks results, I record everything here: [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bH7Zl6aLN-mAvUkmxPdqGnhhBRftPHeEDQ9Ldc\_MM-E/edit?gid=0#gid=0](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bH7Zl6aLN-mAvUkmxPdqGnhhBRftPHeEDQ9Ldc_MM-E/edit?gid=0#gid=0) These results are NOT including fees - I mention fees here for full transparency of P&L - The recorded data in this sheet is mostly for me and the bot users with 1 NQ contract per trade (if you want to calculate the results for 3 MNQ - divide the totals by 3.33)

All of these results are streamed live on YT of course - nothing is made up of course.

Feel free to ask if you have any questions.

Have a good weekend everyone!
